prompt: The primary identity reference and display the exact same Japanese woman in all six panels with strict identity preservation. Keep identical facial structure, eye shape, nose, lips, jawline, cheekbones, forehead, age, ethnicity, hairstyle characteristics, body proportions, and overall personality across every look. Create a premium Korean-style luxury fashion lookbook in a strict 2×3 grid with six equal full-body panels, clear spacing, identical model scale, and clean editorial symmetry. Top-center luxury serif typography: “LOOKBOOK — The Edit • Vol. 01”. Outfit 1: beige oversized blazer, white top, wide-leg trousers, heels. Outfit 2: cropped leather jacket, fitted top, cargo pants, luxury sneakers. Outfit 3: black fitted evening dress with elegant accessories. Outfit 4: white oversized shirt and denim shorts. Outfit 5: cream knit sweater with pleated midi skirt. Outfit 6: monochrome tailored jacket and matching skirt set. Each panel features a different natural standing pose, subtle expression variation, and luxury campaign body language. Background: seamless warm ivory-beige cyclorama studio with no props. Soft diffused Vogue Korea-style studio lighting, realistic shadows, natural skin texture, visible pores, ultra-detailed fabrics, HDR, 8K photorealistic commercial fashion photography. Priority: same face in all six panels, strict 2×3 layout, full-body visibility, clear panel separation, identical scale, luxury department-store catalog presentation. Negative prompt: different face, identity change, face swap, cropped body, overlapping figures, extra limbs, bad anatomy, busy background, props, furniture, logo, watermark, anime, CGI, illustration, plastic skin, blur, low resolution.
